name: Azure DevOps (org/project security groups via group nesting)
status: structure built -- nested-membership adapter mapped to the Azure DevOps Graph API. Azure DevOps grants access by NESTING the Entra group into a DevOps SECURITY GROUP (org- or project-scoped), not by a flat role object, so it uses the membership adapter: resolveContainer = the Entra group's DevOps SUBJECT descriptor; the 'roles' are the org/project security groups; assign = PUT memberships/{group}/{subject}. Live-validation pending an Azure DevOps org the engine SPN is an admin of (Project Collection Administrators) + the org connected to the same Entra tenant.
permissionsNeeded: Azure DevOps: the engine SPN added to the org as a member of 'Project Collection Administrators' (or Project Administrators for project-scoped groups); the org must be backed by the same Entra tenant so the Entra group has a DevOps subject descriptor

prerequisites.perRowResource: Each row's Resource column = the Azure DevOps organization name (e.g. contoso). baseUrl/paths are token-expanded with it so one connector covers every org.
prerequisites.tokenAdapter: auth=devops -> token for the Azure DevOps resource id 499b84ac-1321-427f-aa17-267ca6975798, supplied via $global:PIM_WorkloadTokens['devops'] (launcher-minted) or Get-AzAccessToken with that resource.
prerequisites.subjectDescriptor: DevOps identifies principals by opaque 'descriptors', not objectIds. resolveContainer looks up the Entra group's DevOps subject descriptor from its objectId via vssgp/aadgp materialization (Graph users/groups query by originId == the Entra group objectId). If the group has never signed in / been referenced in DevOps it has no descriptor yet -- the row is skipped with a clear message (provision membership once in the portal, then the descriptor exists).
prerequisites.rolesAreGroups: The 'roles' for this connector are the org/project SECURITY GROUPS (Project Collection Administrators, Build Administrators, Contributors, Readers, project-level groups). listRoles enumerates them via the Graph groups API; RoleName matches a group's principalName or displayName.
prerequisites.scopeNote: Project-scoped groups are listed alongside org-scoped ones; their principalName is namespaced by project ('[ProjectName]\Contributors'), so RoleName should use the full namespaced name to disambiguate.
